---
title: "The Landscape of Data Recording and Reporting for Use of Force and Violence Against Officer Incidents: Insights from Command Staff and Officer Interviews and Focus Groups in the U.S."
categories: ["Mixed-Methods Analysis"]
date: ""
image: "../images/policeuof_screenshot.png"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---
<iframe src="../Police UOF ms.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none;">
  This browser does not support PDFs. Please download the PDF to view it.
</iframe>
